title: 向在这次以巴冲突中被恐怖组织哈马斯屠杀的40名婴儿致以最诚挚的哀悼

meta_keywords: 这次,冲突,恐怖组织,哈马斯,屠杀,40名,婴儿,致以,诚挚,哀悼
contents:
Yesterday forty babies in Israel were head cut-off by the terrorist group Hamas In all of human history atrocities like ISIS have never been done.
Innocent lives were cruelly robbed in this way, which is an atrocity that can never be forgiven by mankind society. 
The organization that brought this terrible havoc will downfall the hell to taste the consequences of their own planting

God's children are being butchered
Lord will unleash his wrath and divine punishment on the earth

Amen

update: Israel official account release a photo about killed baby
